mapFile = join(import.meta.dirname, \u0026quot;cli.js.map\u0026quot;);\nconst outDir = join(import.meta.dirname, \u0026quot;unpacked\u0026quot;);\n\nconsole.log(\u0026quot;Reading source map...\u0026quot;);\nconst map = JSON.parse(readFileSync(mapFile, \u0026quot;utf-8\u0026quot;));\n\nconst sources = map.sources || [];\nconst contents = map.sourcesContent || [];\n\nconsole.log(`Found ${sources.length} source files.`);\n\nlet written = 0;\nlet skipped = 0;\n\nfor (let i = 0; i \u0026lt; sources.length; i++) {\n  const src = sources[i];\n  const content = contents[i];\n\n  if (content == null) {\n    skipped++;\n    continue;\n  }\n\n  const outPath = join(outDir, src.replace(/^\\.\\.\\//g, \u0026quot;\u0026quot;));\n  mkdirSync(dirname(outPath), { recursive: true });\n  writeFileSync(outPath, content);\n  written++;\n}\n\nconsole.log(`Done! <blockquote>
<p dir="auto"><strong>This is NOT an official Anthropic repository.</strong></p>
</blockquote>
<p dir="auto">This repository contains the extracted TypeScript source code of <a href="https://www.anthropic.com/" rel="nofollow">Anthropic's Claude Code</a> CLI tool — Anthropic's official CLI that lets you interact with Claude directly from the terminal to perform software engineering tasks like editing files, running commands, searching codebases, managing git workflows, and more.</p>
<p dir="auto">The source was obtained by unpacking the source map (<code>cli.js.map</code>) bundled with the officially published npm package.</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>npm package:</strong> <a href="https://www.npmjs.com/package/@anthropic-ai/claude-code/v/2.1.88" rel="nofollow">@anthropic-ai/claude-code v2.1.88</a></li>
<li><strong>Official homepage:</strong> <a href="https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code">github.com/anthropics/claude-code</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">How It Leaked</h2><a id="user-content-how-it-leaked" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: How It Leaked" href="#how-it-leaked"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">The source code leak was discovered by <a href="https://x.com/Fried_rice" rel="nofollow">Chaofan Shou (@Fried_rice)</a> and posted publicly on March 31, 2026:</p>
<blockquote>
<p dir="auto"><em>"Claude code source code has been leaked via a map file in their npm registry!"</em></p>
<p dir="auto">— <a href="https://x.com/Fried_rice" rel="nofollow">@Fried_rice</a>, March 31, 2026</p>
</blockquote>
<p dir="auto">The published npm package (<code>@anthropic-ai/claude-code</code>) included a source map file (<code>cli.js.map</code>) containing the full, unobfuscated TypeScript source code. The <code>sourcesContent</code> field of the source map held every original <code>.ts</code>/<code>.tsx</code> file that was bundled into <code>cli.js</code>, making the entire codebase trivially extractable.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Why does this exist?</h2><a id="user-content-why-does-this-exist" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Why does this exist?" href="#why-does-this-exist"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Anthropic publishes Claude Code as a bundled JavaScript CLI on npm. The published package includes a source map file (<code>cli.js.map</code>) that contains the original TypeScript source. This repository simply extracts and preserves that source for easier reading and reference.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">How to get it yourself</h2><a id="user-content-how-to-get-it-yourself" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: How to get it yourself" href="#how-to-get-it-yourself"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<span class="pl-smi">console</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">log</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">`Found <span class="pl-s1"><span class="pl-kos">${</span><span class="pl-s1">sources</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">length</span><span class="pl-kos">}</span></span> source files.`</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

  <span class="pl-k">if</span> <span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">content</span> <span class="pl-c1">==</span> <span class="pl-c1">null</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s1">skipped</span><span class="pl-c1">++</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

  <span class="pl-s1">written</span><span class="pl-c1">++</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span>

Wrote <span class="pl-s1"><span class="pl-kos">${</span><span class="pl-s1">written</span><span class="pl-kos">}</span></span> files to <span class="pl-s1"><span class="pl-kos">${</span><span class="pl-s1">outDir</span><span class="pl-kos">}</span></span>`</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-k">if</span> <span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">skipped</span> <span class="pl-c1">></span> <span class="pl-c1">0</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-smi">console</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">log</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">`Skipped <span class="pl-s1"><span class="pl-kos">${</span><span class="pl-s1">skipped</span><span class="pl-kos">}</span></span> files with no content.`</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="import { readFileSync, writeFileSync, mkdirSync } from "fs";
import { dirname, join } from "path";

const mapFile = join(import.meta.dirname, "cli.js.map");
const outDir = join(import.meta.dirname, "unpacked");

console.log("Reading source map...");
const map = JSON.parse(readFileSync(mapFile, "utf-8"));

const sources = map.sources || [];
const contents = map.sourcesContent || [];

console.log(`Found ${sources.length} source files.`);

let written = 0;
let skipped = 0;

for (let i = 0; i < sources.length; i++) {
  const src = sources[i];
  const content = contents[i];

  if (content == null) {
    skipped++;
    continue;
  }

  const outPath = join(outDir, src.replace(/^\.\.\//g, ""));
  mkdirSync(dirname(outPath), { recursive: true });
  writeFileSync(outPath, content);
  written++;
}

console.log(`Done! Wrote ${written} files to ${outDir}`);
if (skipped > 0) console.log(`Skipped ${skipped} files with no content.`);" tabindex="0" role="button">
